narrative:
Union Township D1D (precinct in Clermont County) has 720 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.9 percentage points.
